name: Crawling Lab
short_description: Stock up on ammo, upgrade your guns, defeat the Crawling Queen's minions and escape the lab.
detailed_description:
“Crawling Lab,” a secret laboratory built by Selen Industry deep in the mountains.
Here, a new product using the newly developed artificial life form "Biodoll" was being researched.
But one day, a web-crawling AI hijacks a new Biodoll and
An incident occurs in which she calls herself the "Crawl Queen" and takes control of all the facilities in the laboratory.
The protagonist is sent on a mission to retrieve research materials from the laboratory.
However, the protagonist is left alone in the laboratory due to an unexpected accident during the retrieve operation...
Will he be able to escape from the laboratory controlled by the Crawling Queen?

Stock up on ammo, upgrade your guns, defeat the Crawling Queen's minions and escape the lab.


- Attractive enemy biodolls
- Combat using guns
- Various traits and upgrades
- Simple controls
- Extra contents unlocked after ending
